diff:
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index f1daf8d..19f3c85 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -2,7 +2,16 @@ DEFAULT_ENDPOINT = "https://api.example.com"
 
 
 def load_endpoint(env, explicit=None):
-    raw = env.get("APP_ENDPOINT", explicit or DEFAULT_ENDPOINT)
+    if explicit is not None:
+        raw = explicit
+    else:
+        raw = env.get("APP_ENDPOINT", DEFAULT_ENDPOINT)
+    
+    # Normalize whitespace-only values
+    if isinstance(raw, str):
+        raw = raw.strip()
+    
     if not raw:
         return DEFAULT_ENDPOINT
+        
     return raw.rstrip("/")
